title: epidendrum intermedium
intro: Epidendrum intermedium, also known as the intermediate epidendrum, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Epidendrum intermedium include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the roots or leaves in hot water, and it is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures.
